commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an optional live-preview finalizer hook to retain drafts after normal fallback delivery, uses it for Discord error finals, and updates focused tests plus streaming docs.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: in current main, a Discord partial preview followed by an isError final skips final editing, calls discardPending, then clears the draft after normal delivery. I did not run a live Discord repro.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor proof and maintainer validation for a draft Discord message-delivery PR, not a concrete automated code repair.

target.title: [codex] Fix Discord error finals clearing previews
target.body:
## Summary

Discord preview streaming deliberately falls back to normal delivery for error finals because errors should not rewrite the draft preview in place. The shared finalizable live-preview fallback path always cleared the draft after normal delivery, though, so an already-visible partial/progress preview was deleted as soon as the separate error message was sent.

This adds an adapter opt-in to retain the visible draft after normal fallback delivery, wires Discord error finals to use it, and updates the streaming docs to describe the behavior.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/message/lifecycle.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

`pnpm tsgo:prod` was attempted on the PR branch, but pnpm entered dependency reconciliation and hung in `pnpm install` while retrying optional package downloads. I stopped that stuck spawned process after the focused tests had already passed.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord partial/progress preview messages should not be deleted when the agent run ends with an error final; the existing preview should remain visible and the error should be sent separately.

Real environment tested: A private OpenClaw 2026.5.19-beta.1 Discord gateway was hot-patched with the compiled equivalent of this change.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Backed up the installed compiled chunks, applied the exact runtime changes to the live-preview and Discord message-handler chunks, syntax-checked both files with `node --check`, restarted `openclaw-gateway.service`, and ran `openclaw gateway status`.

Evidence after fix: Gateway restarted on the patched package, reported runtime running, connectivity probe ok, and admin-capable; grep confirmed the compiled runtime contains `retainDraftOnNormalDelivery` in both the shared live-preview chunk and Discord message handler.

Observed result after fix: Runtime is ready to preserve already-visible Discord previews on error-final fallback delivery.

What was not tested: I did not run a full live Discord interaction that intentionally forces an LLM/network error after partial preview text; the private beta instance is patched for that follow-up smoke.
